meta.description: All illegal transitions in the synthetic mini-language system. A transition is illegal if it has zero probability (structurally absent edge). Use this to validate generated sequences.
meta.note_on_verb_adj_categories: Verb-category and adjective-category transition matrices are not yet defined. Until they are, all intra-verb-category and intra-adjective-category transitions are structurally absent.

pos_illegal_transitions.description: Illegal transitions between POS types (START, NOUN, VERB, ADJ, END). Any sequence containing one of these consecutive POS pairs is illegal.

noun_category_illegal_transitions.description: Illegal transitions between noun subcategories. These apply whenever a NOUN->NOUN POS transition is taken.

noun_to_adj_illegal_transitions.description: Category-level illegal transitions from NOUN categories to ADJ categories.

noun_to_verb_illegal_transitions.description: Category-level illegal transitions from NOUN categories to VERB categories.

adj_to_noun_illegal_transitions.description: Category-level illegal transitions from ADJ categories to NOUN categories.

verb_to_adj_illegal_transitions.description: Category-level illegal transitions from VERB categories to ADJ categories.

verb_to_noun_illegal_transitions.description: Category-level illegal transitions from VERB categories to NOUN categories.
